== Notes for [[Item:Q114624|Q114624]] ==

Faquilena d' Astarac1

b. circa 920

Father Arnaldo, comte d'Astarac b. circa 890, d. after 960

Also called Garsenda d' Astarac.2 Faquilena d' Astarac was born circa 920. She was the daughter of Arnaldo, comte d'Astarac. Faquilena d' Astarac married Raymond I Dato, comte de Bigorre, son of Dato II, comte de Bigorre and Lopa Sancha de Navarre, before 950; Her 1st. Faquilena d' Astarac married vicomte d'Aure Oriol de Bigorre, son of Dato II, comte de Bigorre and Lopa Sancha de Navarre, circa 970; Her 2nd.1

Family 1

Raymond I Dato, comte de Bigorre b. circa 929, d. after 956

Child

Arnaldo I, comte de Bigorre+ b. c 9501

Family 2

vicomte d'Aure Oriol de Bigorre b. circa 935

Citations

[S1265] Genealogy.eu, online genealogy.euweb.cz, Counts of Bigorre, Ribagorza and Pailhars.

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 216-35.

#Générale##Générale#Apporte Magnoac en dot.
Dame de Larboust et Oueil, Comtesse d'Aure.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
